diffCoverage.notes: types + zalo + command touched in the core; ui consumes via IPC only.

findings.evidence: Contact DTO lives in types/; zalo::list_contacts maps zca-rust User -> Contact (zca-rust confined to zalo); command::list_contacts depends on zalo + types. Forward-only types -> ... -> zalo -> ... -> command holds. The ui reads contacts only through the list_contacts command.
findings.fix: When groups (get_all_groups) are added, keep the User/Group mapping inside zalo and add a parallel Group DTO in types.

summary: Cross-layer change (types + zalo + command) for the contacts feature reviewed for layering. The new Contact DTO sits in types, zca-rust mapping stays in zalo, command exposes it, and the ui consumes via IPC — forward-only DAG and ui/core boundary preserved. Approve.
